posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Here’s what’s new in the past few weeks:

API

  • Breaking change rollback: data object in error codes

Apps

  • New create item dialog SDK method
  • Changes to seat-based app calculations
  • Removing directives on June 1st
  • New ability to create secrets for monday code through the UI
